user.title: WeatherFlow Lightning Trilateration
user.description:
Configure Tempest stations for lightning trilateration.

API Token: Log in to tempestwx.com, go to Settings > Data Authorizations, and generate a token.
Primary Station: Enter your station ID or coordinates as lat,lon (e.g., {local_station_id} detected from your Home Assistant integration).
Neighboring Stations: Enter a comma-separated list of nearby station IDs (at least 2 are required to calculate strikes).

To find neighboring station IDs, locate nearby stations on the Tempest Map at tempestwx.com/map and extract the ID from the station URL (e.g., in tempestwx.com/station/81149/ the ID is 81149).

data.name: Name
data.primary_station: Primary Station (ID or coordinates as lat,lon)

error.empty_primary: The primary station ID or coordinate cannot be empty.
error.invalid_station_id: The primary station ID appears to be a device serial number (e.g. 00172794). Please enter a valid station ID (e.g. 172103) or ensure your API Token is correct to auto-resolve it.

init.title: WeatherFlow Lightning Trilateration Options
init.description: Update configuration options for WeatherFlow Lightning Trilateration.
